title: Senior Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies!
